ogTitle: Kangaroo Ground vs Kanumbra: Climate Safety

heading: Kangaroo Ground vs Kanumbra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kangaroo Ground, Victoria and Kanumbra, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kanumbra has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Kangaroo Ground (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kangaroo Ground or Kanumbra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kangaroo Ground has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Kanumbra scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kangaroo Ground scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Kanumbra scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kangaroo Ground or Kanumbra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kanumbra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
